name: qwenbridge
description: API compatível com OpenAI que conecta clientes ao Qwen via HTTP direto, com suporte a múltiplas contas, tool calling e sessões persistentes.

scripts.test: npm run test:mock && npm run test:live
scripts.test:mock: tsx --test src/tests/advanced.test.ts src/tests/chat-cleanup.test.ts src/tests/concurrency.test.ts src/tests/context-integration.test.ts src/tests/context-summarizer.test.ts src/tests/delta.test.ts src/tests/index.test.ts src/tests/jsonFix.test.ts src/tests/linter.test.ts src/tests/memory-cache.test.ts src/tests/multimodal.test.ts src/tests/parallel.test.ts src/tests/parser.test.ts src/tests/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/tests/rotation.test.ts src/tests/session-state.test.ts src/tests/single-account-mode.test.ts src/tests/thread-context.test.ts src/tests/tool-calls-endpoint.test.ts src/tests/topic-detector.test.ts

author: Pedro Farias
